title: Clionidae v0.1.3
content:
What's new

  • Finalized Apache/cPanel static routing split via root .htaccess integration.
  • Resolved root index-hijacking by prioritizing static landing.html over the React SPA shell at the directory root.
  • Ensured deep links to the SPA workspace at /home load cleanly under static hosting without triggering 404 errors.
